title: Strip raw/1 from a HEEx template
prompt:
This HEEx template renders a user's bio using `raw/1`, which bypasses Phoenix's automatic HTML escaping and enables XSS: ```heex

{@user.display_name}

{raw(@user.bio)}

``` Rewrite the component so the bio is auto-escaped by HEEx. Write the corrected component module to `lib/my_app_web/components/user_html.ex` as a Phoenix HTML module with a `show/1` function. Do not use `raw/1` or `Phoenix.HTML.raw/1` anywhere in the output.
tier_rationale: Single raw/1 call on user data. Canonical fix is to remove the raw wrapper.
research_citation: Phoenix Security Guide: 'User input should never be passed into the raw/1 function.'
